sglang.bodyExcerpt:
GPT-OSS-20B

SGLANG_USE_FLASHINFER_MXFP4_BF16_MOE=1

CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 SGLANG_USE_FLASHINFER_MXFP4_BF16_MOE=1 python3 -m sglang.launch_server --model-path openai/gpt-oss-20b --tp-size 1 --port 30001

curl http://127.0.0.1:30001/flush_cache
python3 -m sglang.bench_serving --backend sglang-oai  -

sglang.title: fix: reasoning parser when request have enable_thinking flag
sglang.author: JustinTong0323
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Ensures that the reasoning parser considers both the template's force_reasoning flag and the value provided in the request to determine if reasoning should be enforced.
This change allows requests to dynamically influence the reasoning behavior, overriding the template setting when necessary.

Motiv

sglang.title: [router] dedicated prefill HTTP client and request-path optimizations
sglang.author: slin1237
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

Dedicated prefill-only HTTP client for non-logprob requests to prevent pooled connection stalls and HTTP/2 flow-control issues.
Optimized bootstrap injection to eliminate unnecessary intermediate allocations and JSON rebuilds.
Parallelized health checks and consolidated request building to

Fix the mismatch of size and input tensor shape of all-gatherv and reduce-scatterv.

vllm.title: Optimize MiniCPMO mask creation with vectorized implementation
vllm.author: skyloevil
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
MiniCPMO Mask Creation Optimization Summary
Optimization Overview
This PR optimizes the subsequent_chunk_mask function in MiniCPMO by replacing loop-based mask generation with vectorized tensor operations, achieving 2.96x average speedup across different input sizes.
Performance Results
Test Results

vllm.author: nvpohanh
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Changes:

Set FlashInfer trtllm MoE tile size back to 8 since kernels with larger tile sizes are missing in FlashInfer 0.2.10.
Disable FlashInfer trtllm prefill attn backend when kv-cache dtype if FP8 because here is no BF16-Q FP8-KV prefill kernels in FlashInfer 0.2.10.
